column1: # audit-signals.tsv — domain-presence signals for audit-scan.py (the iOS orchestrator's STEERING layer).
#   always = relevant on ANY project containing SwiftUI (cross-cutting concerns).
#   cond   = relevant ONLY if the regex matches at least one SwiftUI file (domain is actually present).
# Regexes are Python `re` syntax (\s, \b, …) — consumed only by audit-scan.py, never by grep.
# iOS roster: 8 always (cross-cutting) + 26 cond = 34 domain skills. Orchestrator = audit-ios-swiftui-full.
# +1 visual reviewer: design-review (always) — pixel-first design/UX, self-degrades to code-only if no build.
